Patch Set 14:

Looks like this is failing build on SLES11:

 lgetxattr_size_check.c:2:24: error: attr/xattr.h: No such file or directory
 cc1: warnings being treated as errors
 lgetxattr_size_check.c: In function 'main':
 lgetxattr_size_check.c:27: error: implicit declaration of function 'lgetxattr'
 make[4]: *** [lgetxattr_size_check.o] Error 1

I suspect we don't have the libattr-devel RPM (or SLES equivalent) installed.  I've filed TT-898 to get this package installed on our SLES11 build node.

Patch Set 14: Looks good to me, approved

Patch itself looks fine, and build can be resubmitted once the builder is updated.  No need to refresh patch yet.

Patch Set 15:

We have build error:

gcc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../..  -D__arch_lib__ -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE=1 -I/opt/lam/include -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DLUSTRE_UTILS -include /usr/src/packages/BUILD/cray-lustre-2.3/config.h -I/usr/src/packages/BUILD/cray-lustre-2.3/libcfs/include -I/usr/src/packages/BUILD/cray-lustre-2.3/lnet/include -I/usr/src/packages/BUILD/cray-lustre-2.3/lustre/include  -g -Wall -fPIC -D_GNU_SOURCE -fmessage-length=0 -O2 -Wall -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -funwind-tables -fasynchronous-unwind-tables -Werror -fno-stack-protector -Werror -MT lgetxattr_size_check.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/lgetxattr_size_check.Tpo -c -o lgetxattr_size_check.o lgetxattr_size_check.c
lgetxattr_size_check.c:2:24: error: attr/xattr.h: No such file or directory
cc1: warnings being treated as errors

It appears that our SLES11 xattr.h is in <sys/xattr.h>

commit.subject: LU-279 tests: Ensure lgetxattr is consistent
commit.message:
LU-279 tests: Ensure lgetxattr is consistent

* Added the lgetxattr_size_check.c program to compare the size returned
  by lgetxattr() when passed zero size buffers and non zero size buffers
* Sanity test 17l was added to make use of this new test program and
  ensure that the values returned by lgetxattr remain consistent

Signed-off-by: Prakash Surya <surya1@llnl.gov>
Change-Id: Id46dbe888d42b058e02ec32b6d1612705d7f6349
